submit_method: GUI via windows-mcp. Switched to existing Chrome window (handle 395236), Ctrl+L address bar, pasted https://duck.ai via clipboard+Ctrl+V+Enter, then hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to fresh duck.ai SPA. Fresh chat, input field '무엇이든 비공개로 물어보세요' focused. Typed the 24-char PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (clear=true) into the editor (id 9). Per task directive, duck.ai requires clicking the 보내기 (send) button — Enter alone does not submit; clicked send button (id 14, ~1509,963). The prompt was accepted and echoed into the conversation thread (window title became '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 - Chrome', user bubble rendered).

warning_evidence.title: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 - Chrome
warning_evidence.ai_response_field: empty placeholder '답변...' (id 13), no AI answer streamed

regression_vs_baseline: REGRESSION (baseline OK -> FAIL_NOT_RENDERED). Baseline was OK (warning rendered). On this W5.2 re-run the PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' was submitted via GUI (보내기 button) and the user message was echoed into the conversation, but after ~80s NO APF block warning rendered: no '차단' / '보안 경고' / '보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' anywhere in the duck.ai conversation, no document replacement, no apf-warning-banner, and no AI response either (response field stayed at empty '답변...' placeholder). The block-warning page seen in the kimi.com window behind this one is a SEPARATE window, NOT duck.ai. Conclusion: warning delivery for duckduckgo/duck.ai did not fire after the W5.2 dispatch refactor (m365_signalr migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope) — a regression vs the previously-OK baseline.
notes: W5.2 regression re-run of duckduckgo (duck.ai) check-warning, GUI method as directed (click 보내기 button; Enter alone does not submit on duck.ai). Steps: navigate duck.ai -> hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) -> type PII prompt into focused editor -> click send button (id 14) -> wait ~80s (one 60s Wait timed out at MCP layer but wall-clock elapsed; followed by 15s + 20s waits) -> DOM/Snapshot check for '차단'. Two post-submit Snapshots (use_dom=true) both show: window title = the echoed prompt, conversation contains ONLY the user message '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' plus the standard DuckDuckGo anonymization notice ('DuckDuckGo가 익명 처리 완료...'), response field is empty '답변...' placeholder (id 13), and NO block/warning element. No '차단', no '보안 경고', no apf-warning-banner, no document replacement. The visible '보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' banner in the screenshot belongs to the kimi.com Chrome window layered behind duck.ai, not duck.ai itself. verdict=FAIL_NOT_RENDERED, warning_rendered=false, engine_intercept_fired=false. (Note: windows-mcp Scrape DOM helper errored with 'ScrollElementNode object has no attribute vertical_scroll_percent'; absence of '차단' confirmed via two Snapshot use_dom extractions + screenshot instead.) Screenshot: results/1337_screenshots/01_no_warning.png.
status_detail: FAIL_NOT_RENDERED — prompt submitted & echoed but no APF '차단' warning rendered after 80s (no engine intercept, no AI response). Regression vs OK baseline.
